title: Typing indicators: relay protocol + JMAP push
description: Add typing indicator support. Relay protocol: new JSON-RPC method 'typing' (C→S: {to: pub_id, typing: bool}) and 'typing_notify' (S→C notification: {from: pub_id, typing: bool}). Relay forwards without storage (ephemeral). nie-daemon: translate relay typing_notify into JMAP EventSource typing event {chatId, senderId, typing}. Relay must rate-limit per-sender.
close_reason: Typing indicators fully implemented: TypingParams/TypingNotifyParams in nie-core, relay TYPING handler with rate-limit, DaemonEvent::Typing in daemon, relay.rs dispatch, Chat/typing JMAP method, SSE typing event in EventSource. 4 new unit tests.
